CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S Application for a right to attach order is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/HK)
